sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n63296" key="limenormi/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λῐμεν-ορμίτης</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">μῑ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, </foreign>(<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">λιμήν, ὅρμος</etym>) <sense id="n63296.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">god of harbours and mooring-places</tr_>, epith. of Priapus, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.5</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Thyill.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
